name: Anthony Recreation Center
description: Anthony Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Manhattan, KS. There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Douglass Community Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Douglass Community Rec Center in Manhattan, KS! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Eisenhower Recreation Center
description: Eisenhower Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Manhattan, KS. There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Call ahead to see if pickleball is available.  **Floors have several "dead spots" so this location is not the preferred location for most players.

name: Frederick Douglass Recreation Complex
description: Frederick Douglass Recreation Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Manhattan, KS. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The courts are free. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Genesis Health Clubs
description: Come play pickleball at Genesis Health Clubs in Manhattan, KS! There are 2 indoor wood courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like trainers or lessons.

name: MHS East Campus
description: Come play pickleball at MHS East Campus in Manhattan, KS! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Susan B Anthony Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Susan B Anthony Middle School in Manhattan, KS! There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.
open_play_schedule:
Open play daily
Unless reserved for other sports activities.
